title: Deploy A Store to Internet Computer Mainnet

requirements.summary: Deploy the application to Internet Computer mainnet with public canister URL access
acceptanceCriteria: Application is deployed to Internet Computer mainnet
All canisters (frontend and backend) are running on mainnet
Application is accessible via a public canister URL
Internet Identity authentication works with mainnet deployment
All existing features (product catalog, order system, admin dashboard) function correctly on mainnet

file_operations.description: Update canister initialization to support mainnet deployment by ensuring the actor connection uses production canister IDs when deployed to mainnet. Verify that authentication flows and backend actor instantiation work correctly with Internet Identity on mainnet.

Verify Internet Identity configuration supports mainnet deployment. Ensure AuthClient options are compatible with mainnet Internet Identity service and that delegation chain validation works in production environment.
Update metadata and ensure proper configuration for mainnet deployment. Verify all asset references and configuration are production-ready.
